# FastingTool — Intermittent Fasting Calculator & Guide

> FastingTool is a free online calculator and educational resource for intermittent fasting. We help users plan fasting schedules, track fasting windows, and understand the science behind time-restricted eating.

## Site Overview

- **Domain**: https://fastingtool.org
- **Contact**: contact@fastingtool.org
- **Primary Language**: English
- **Site Type**: Health tool + educational content
- **Last Updated**: 2026-05-03

## Key Pages

### Tools
- [Home / Calculator](https://fastingtool.org/) — Calculate personalized fasting schedules for 16:8, 18:6, 20:4, 5:2, and OMAD methods. Includes a fasting timer.

### Guides
- [What Is Intermittent Fasting?](https://fastingtool.org/what-is-intermittent-fasting.html) — Complete beginner's guide covering mechanisms, benefits, and safety.
- [Fasting Methods Compared](https://fastingtool.org/fasting-methods-guide.html) — Side-by-side comparison of 14:10, 16:8, 18:6, 20:4, OMAD, and 5:2.
- [How to Break Your Fast](https://fastingtool.org/breaking-your-fast.html) — Best foods, common mistakes, and sample meals for ending a fast safely.
- [FAQ](https://fastingtool.org/faq.html) — Answers to common questions about muscle loss, coffee, exercise, metabolism, and more.

### Blog
- [Blog Index](https://fastingtool.org/blog/)
- [Fasting Myths Debunked](https://fastingtool.org/blog/fasting-myths.html)
- [Common Fasting Mistakes](https://fastingtool.org/blog/common-mistakes.html)

## Content Policy

- All health claims are backed by peer-reviewed research where possible.
- We do not provide medical advice. Users should consult healthcare professionals before starting any fasting regimen.
- No personal health data is collected or stored.

## Technical

- Built with semantic HTML5 and ARIA accessibility labels.
- Mobile-first responsive design.
- No tracking cookies required for core functionality.
